title: ModalEntry
description: One frame on state.ui.modalStack. The stack replaces per-screen callerRoute fields so deeply nested confirm-on-confirm flows preserve the bottom caller and per-element focus. Lives in state.ui.* and is excluded from saves and replays. The full lifecycle is pinned in docs/architecture/ui-routing.md § Modal Stack.

openedAt.description: Reducer tick at which the modal was pushed. Used for stale-modal eviction and deterministic ordering when two modal opens land in the same frame.

callerRoute.description: Screen route that owned focus when the modal was pushed. ScreenRoute id from docs/architecture/wiki/screens/index.json. Restored after MODAL_CLOSE pops this entry.

previousFocusElementId.description: DOM-side focusOrder id of the control that had keyboard focus before the modal opened. Null when no element was focused. Restored on MODAL_CLOSE per ui-hotkeys.md § Focus Restoration.

severity.description: Determines the dismissal policy. See docs/architecture/ui-routing.md § Dismissal Policy. 'destructive' rejects click-outside-to-close and remaps Esc to Cancel.

params.description: Caller-provided payload. Closed shape is defined per modal id in the owning screen's data-contracts.md. Stored values must be JSON-safe so the stack survives reducer canonicalization checks.

modalId.description: Closed enum of modal screen ids. Sourced from the wiki index.json modal entries. New modals MUST add a screen package and extend this enum in the same change.
